news.paragraph: Palantir is expanding its defense footprint through planned interoperability scaling with the US Army and a significant AI-driven growth narrative involving battlefield data in Ukraine. Although some reports highlight competitive pressure from other AI stocks and question its performance relative to dividend-paying equities, the company's military contract expansion remains a key driver. No imminent earnings or regulatory catalysts are mentioned in the current headlines.
headlines: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) Plans to Scale Interoperability Across the US Army and the Department of War
